CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Nici Rodich, CSR# 11604. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Continued To Sep-16-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On Petition For Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Lidia S. Stiglich, Esq. appeared with petitioner Thomas Nang Tri Tu, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Darren Tu Kim, who was not present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $200,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $50,000.00.
Medical Expenses - $6,357.27.

A net balance of $143,642.73 shall be made payable to Prudential Assigned Settlement Services Corportion. Defendant will sign a Qualified Assignment document to assign its obligation to make periodic payments to the Assignee, Prudential Assigned Settlement Services Corporation. Prudential Assigned Settlement Services Corporation, as the Assignee, shall disperse the $143,642.73 as set forth in Attachement 7b(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Petition to Compromise the Disputed Claim of a Minor.

Order Approving the Petition to Compromise the Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
